title: Charge case inside screen/forth screen, right zoom in/out
scenario: Quick Start Guide charge case inside screen zoom toggle fails when clicking right circle button to zoom in/out
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
Locate and tap the Quick Start Guide (QSG) option.
Swipe or navigate to the fourth screen of the QSG showing the charge case inside view.
Tap the right circle button on the screen.
Observe the charge case inside view.
Tap the same right circle button again.
expected: On first tap, the charge case inside view zooms in and displays new text. On second tap, the view zooms out to the original charge case inside screen.
